title: Mark G. Heike
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Mark G. Heike''' (born [[1950s|1959]]) is the Associate Editor for AC Comics. He has done freelance work on ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] as an inker for [[Dark Horse Comics]].

{{Bio-stub}}
